'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=5Ji16cSzQ_MxiAbiWgfOA_8_sd36VFL_YAL.nWAewSo-1775943390-1.0.1.1-_YboO06f.V7pM_AxZnPbx5bgKmIhSLbPKZJpMi4tu_I"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
